title: Kyros's Past Begins
description: Pages 6–10 focus on kyros's past begins, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Trebol, Franky, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as the truth behind the Toy Soldier and his devotion to Rebecca begins to surface as Dressrosa's tragedy grows clearer.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: All of the bridges are draw- bridges.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The one that looks like an an an an an an an an an an an an an an an awesome.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's where our target, sugar, is!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: GYAH! They've found us!! It's all over!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Err... I was just passing by, and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: If you're not making Negota- Tions, then you're not allowed off your ship...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Ehh!!? It must be the fairies!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: ...Ooh!! They've been driven into the ground!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You should change clothes, usoland and Robind.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: That was so clever of you! pretending to be scared in order to bait the enemy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Are... are all of you that strong??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: But we're nothing compared to those of Noland's Tri- Be, who are even capable of taking down sea kings!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Just how much of a monster do these guys think I am!? But, well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: I might be able to pull this off without doing any fighting myself!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Listen up, guys! Usoland is taking charge now!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Our opponent is a little girl!! Let's gang up on her and scare her!! Just follow me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: layout of the royal palace, toy house, and commerce port.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: There are invaders at the toy house!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: So it seems the Strawhat crew has made its move!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Senior Pink is currently fighting outside the East Door!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: I heard that if we stop them, we get a bonus!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: The InVaders' Target is the factory at this level!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Really!!? How much do we get!!?

summary: Kyros's Past Begins focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Trebol, Franky, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as the truth behind the Toy Soldier and his devotion to Rebecca begins to surface as Dressrosa's tragedy grows clearer.
